reasoning: With a 9.3% drop from 5-min to 20-min power, we need to enhance your lactate clearance and aerobic base. Your last ride showed a consistent effort, but to conquer the Alpine Loop’s strenuous demands, we’ll target fatigue resistance by mimicking the key climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x 8-min blocks: 3-min at 201-218W, then 2-min at 242-256W. 3-min rest at 150W.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
